lyric_text:
May be I didn't love you

Quite as often as I should have

And may be I didn't treat you

Quite as good as I could have

If I make you feel of second best

Girl, I'm sorry I was blind

You were always on my mind

You were always on my mind

And may be I didn't hold you

All those lonely, lonely times

I guess I never told you

I'm so happy that you're mine

Little things I should have said and done

I just never took the time

You were alwayson my mind

You were always on my mind

Tell me, tell me that your sweet love hasn't died

And give me, give me one more chance

To keep you satis  fied,I  keep you satis fied


You were alwayson my mind

You were alwayson my mind
